title: The impoverishing effect of tobacco expenditure. Smoking drives households into poverty.
dek: Tobacco use increases extreme poverty in Mexico. About one million Mexicans—who would not otherwise fall below the official poverty line due to their income level—are unable to cover their basic needs due to tobacco spending. Public policies that reduce tobacco consumption not only produce health benefits but also decr

title: Efecto empobrecedor derivado del gasto en tabaco. El consumo de tabaco empuja hogares a la pobreza.
dek: El uso del tabaco incrementa la pobreza extrema en México. Alrededor de un millón de mexicanos no tiene ingresos suficientes para cubrir sus necesidades básicas debido a el gasto en tabaco. title: The crowding-out effect of tobacco consumption. Tobacco consumption reduces expenditure on essential goods.
dek: In Mexico, tobacco consumption crowds out spending on essential goods and services like education and health care while increasing expenditure on harmful goods like alcoholic beverages. Lower-income households are most impacted by crowding out and see the greatest reduction in expenditure on health care and education.

title: Desplazamiento del gasto debido al consumo de tabaco. El consumo de tabaco disminuye el gasto en bienes esenciales.
dek: El consumo de tabaco en México desplaza el gasto en bienes y servicios esenciales, como educación y salud, al mismo tiempo que incrementa el gasto en bienes nocivos, como las bebidas alcohólicas.
